source_excerpt:
AB 1637
Adds a new law to the Medical Practice Act to state that a physician’s medical document
is  the  responsibility  of  that  physician  and  that  the  physician’s  patient  notes,  after-visit
summaries,  and  diagnosis  and  treatment  plans  shall  not  be  changed  by  anyone  other
than the authoring physician.

Board members and staff discussed the bill.

Dr. Tsai moved to support the bill, if amended S:/ Dr. Ayala-Rodriguez, 12-0-1 (Dr.
Mahmood Abstained)

correct_facts.subject: Makes a physician responsible for their medical documentation and bars anyone other than the authoring physician from altering patient notes, after-visit summaries, and diagnosis and treatment plans.
correct_facts.status_note: Board voted 12-0-1 to support if amended.
correct_facts.quote: Dr. Tsai moved to support the bill, if amended

commentary: involvement='supporting' because the board voted to support the bill (the 'if amended' condition does not change that it expressed support); bill_number normalized to 'AB 1637'; bill_state='CA'.
